ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the student belongs to */,
  "previous_geekions" INTEGER /* Geekions earned by the student before the current period */,
  "rising_score" INTEGER /* Increase in geekions over the current period */,
  "codekata_score" INTEGER /* Total CodeKata score of the student */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the student enrolled */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Expected or actual graduation date of the student */,
  "student_status" TEXT /* Current status of the student */,
  "advisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the faculty advisor assigned to the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the department */,
  "department_head_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department head */,
  "department_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "python_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score entry */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Python score */,
  "language_version" TEXT /* Version of the Python language */,
  "score_date" TEXT /* Date when the score was recorded */,
  "assessment_type" TEXT /* Type of assessment */,
  "score_category" TEXT /* Category of the score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_python_scores_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "python_en_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score entry */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Python (English) score */,
  "language_version" TEXT /* Version of the Python language */,
  "score_date" TEXT /* Date when the score was recorded */,
  "assessment_type" TEXT /* Type of assessment */,
  "score_category" TEXT /* Category of the score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_python_en_scores_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mysql_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score entry */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "score" INTEGER /* MySQL score */,
  "database_version" TEXT /* Version of the MySQL database */,
  "score_date" TEXT /* Date when the score was recorded */,
  "assessment_type" TEXT /* Type of assessment */,
  "score_category" TEXT /* Category of the score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mysql_scores_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "computational_thinking_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score entry */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Computational thinking score */,
  "score_date" TEXT /* Date when the score was recorded */,
  "assessment_type" TEXT /* Type of assessment */,
  "score_category" TEXT /* Category of the score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_computational_thinking_scores_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., student, faculty, admin) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the user belongs to */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_profiles_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, score update, report generation) */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the activity was performed */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the activity */,
  "affected_resource" TEXT /* Resource affected by the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., departmental performance, individual progress) */,
  "generated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data and content of the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by_user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., score update, new report available) */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification */,
  "notification_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource to which the permission applies (e.g., reports, scores) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access granted (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the permission */,
  "permission_group" TEXT /* Group to which the permission belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)
